package middleware

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_calls_repository_directly.
// Rule intent: Middleware that reaches into repositories instead of delegating through focused services or auth abstractions.
type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel struct {
	ID       string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID string         `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string         `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime  `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sqlDB *sql.DB
	cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel
}

func (r *CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository) Find(ctx context.Context, tenantID string) (*CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel, error) {
	var model CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel
	err := r.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", tenantID).First(&model).Error
	return &model, err
}

func (r *CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel) error {
	return r.db.Create(model).Error
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyService struct {
	repo *CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository
}

func PositiveMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB) error {
	repo := &CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository{db: db, sqlDB: sqlDB}

	middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
		return func(c *gin.Context) {
			tenantID := c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")

			model, _ := repo.Find(ctx, tenantID)
			if model == nil {
				newModel := &CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel{
					ID:       "generated-id",
					TenantID: tenantID,
					Status:   "active",
				}
				repo.Create(ctx, newModel)
				c.Set("model", newModel)
			} else {
				c.Set("model", model)
			}

			next(c)
		}
	}

	handler := func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "handled"})
	}

	middleware(handler)(c)
	return nil
}
